name: Clearing timestamp
description: For a transaction cleared at a CCP, Clearing timestamp is the date and time, notified to the reporting entity by the CCP, that the transaction was cleared by the CCP.
format: ISO 8601 YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ssZ date and time in UTC.
optionalityRules: Required where Cleared is reported as Y.
Not reported for Cleared reported as ‘N’ or ‘I’.
Not reported for TERM, EROR, PRTO Action types.
valueRules: If Cleared is reported as Y, Clearing timestamp is equal to Execution timestamp.
